title: Al-Ma'mun's letters to his governors appointing his brother Abu Ishaq al-Mu'tasim and his successor and commending him to their obedience
description: Al-Ma'mun's letters to his governors appointing his brother Abu Ishaq al-Mu'tasim and his successor and commending him to their obedience. Recorded under the year 218 AH (833–834 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
